decoder_heading: No personally identifiable information is stored on your device or sent back regarding your use of the application.

decoder_heading: Application usage information and crash reports are tracked either using Google Firebase, in accordance with their Privacy Policy or a private fully anonymized Matomo server, to allow us to determine which features are most popular, how they are being used, and how we can improve the applications.
